text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is a branch of computer science that creates systems capable of performing tasks that normally require human intelligence. These tasks include learning, problem-solving, and decision-making. A key part of AI is machine learning, where computers learn from data without being explicitly programmed. Deep learning, a more advanced subset, uses artificial neural networks to process complex information, like recognizing faces or understanding speech. AI is already part of daily life. It powers voice assistants like Siri, recommends movies on streaming services, and helps doctors diagnose diseases. As AI improves, it continues to change how we work, communicate, and live.
